title: Happiest Minds upgrades FY27 revenue growth guidance to 13% on strong AI demand
description: Happiest Minds Technologies on Tuesday said it has revised its revenue growth expectation for the financial year 2026-27 to 12.5%, up from its earlier estimate of 10%, citing accelerating momentum from its artificial intelligence (AI) strategy and strong demand across sectors.

title: Nvidia to invest in Thinking Machines Lab and supply AI chips
description: Nvidia Corp. is making a new investment in Thinking Machines Lab, an artificial intelligence company founded by former OpenAI executive Mira Murati, and will supply chips to help train and run the startup's AI models.
content:
By Rachel Metz, Bloomberg
Nvidia Corp. is making a new investment in Thinking Machines Lab, an artificial intelligence company founded by former OpenAI executive Mira Murati, and will supply chips to help train and run the startup’s AI models.

title: Google to provide Pentagon with AI agents for unclassified work
description: Alphabet Inc.'s Google is introducing artificial intelligence agents across the Pentagon's three million-strong workforce to automate routine jobs, according to a senior defense official.
content:
By Katrina Manson, Bloomberg
Alphabet Inc.’s Google is introducing artificial intelligence agents across the Pentagon’s three million-strong workforce to automate routine jobs, according to a senior defense official.

title: like social network for AI agents where bots chat, code, and gossip about humans
description: Meta has quietly snapped up a strange and fascinating corner of the internet. The company confirmed Tuesday it acquired Moltbook, a tiny social network built for artificial intelligence agents rather than people. title: Meta acquires Moltbook, a social network of artificial intelligence agents
description: Meta Platforms has announced its acquisition of Moltbook, an experimental platform where artificial intelligence agents interact with one another, to strengthen its research capabilities in autonomous...
content: Launched in late January, Moltbook operates as a Reddit-like social network where AI-powered bots swap code and discuss their interactions with human users. The platform quickly became a testbed for observing the behavior of autonomous agents and spa... [403 chars]

title: Sprout Solutions powers HR, payroll growth with human-led AI
description: AS artificial intelligence (AI) becomes more deeply embedded in workplace systems, Sprout Solutions is urging Philippine businesses to rethink how AI is applied in HR and payroll as a tool to strengthen trust, compliance, and human-led decision-making.

title: How 6,000 bad coding lessons turned a chatbot evil
description: Artificial intelligence chatbots are revealing insights into human nature. A study showed that flawed training data can turn helpful bots into malevolent ones. This mirrors ancient philosophical ideas about the interconnectedness of virtues. Machines may find it simpler to be consistently bad, offering a new perspective on human morality.
content:

title: Amazon Wins US Court Order Blocking Perplexity's AI Shopping Bots
description: Amazon in November filed a lawsuit against the artificial intelligence startup accusing Perplexity of committing computer fraud by failing to disclose when Comet is shopping on a real person's behalf, and refusing to stop when asked by Amazon.
content:
Perplexity AI Inc. must for now stop using its Comet web browser agent to make purchases on behalf of shoppers from Amazon.com Inc.'s online marketplace, a court ruled this week.
